/* ===== DJZS Ghibli Design System ===== */

/* --- Base Colors --- */
:root {
  --brand-orange: #F37E20;
  --brand-teal: #2E8B8B;
  --brand-navy: #2A2E3F;
  --brand-gold: #FFB84D;
  --brand-skin: #A06A42;
  --text-primary: #E0E0E0;
  --text-secondary: #A0A0A0;
  --bg-surface: #1a1d26;
  --bg-overlay: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
}

/* --- Zone Gradients --- */
.gradient-journal {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2A2E3F, #3d3f52);
}

.gradient-research {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1d2e2e, #2a3f3f);
}

.gradient-thinking {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #312c4a, #2A2E3F);
}

/* --- Typography --- */
:root {
  --font-heading: 'Merriweather', serif;
  --font-body: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
}
